placeholders.enterUri: Enter custom URI or leave empty for auto-generation

messages.noLabels: This entity has no labels. Click "Edit Labels" to add one.
messages.selectClass: Please select a class from the left panel to create a new entity.
messages.noRangeSpecified: No range specified for this property. Cannot suggest entities.
messages.selectWEMIEntity: Select a WEMI entity for relationship:

writeError.network: Cannot reach the database. This may be a read-only demo server, an offline endpoint, or a cross-origin restriction. Your changes were not saved.
writeError.unauthorized: The database requires a username and password to accept changes. Open Settings to provide credentials.
writeError.forbidden: The database refused the change. This endpoint is read-only — typical for a demo server. Configure a writable endpoint in Settings to save.
writeError.server: The database reported an error and did not apply the change. Please try again or check the server logs.

labelManager.title: Manage Labels
labelManager.empty: No labels yet — click Add to create one

errors.duplicateLanguage: A label with language "{{lang}}" already exists
errors.duplicateNoLanguage: A label without a language tag already exists

delete.title: Delete Entity
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this entity? This action will permanently remove all statements about this entity from the database and cannot be undone.

discard.title: Discard changes?
discard.message: You have unsaved changes. Cancelling will discard all changes made in this session.

saveWarning.title: Auto-generated values
saveWarning.messageBoth: This entity will be saved with an auto-generated URI and an auto-generated label. Are you sure you want to continue?
saveWarning.messageUri: This entity will be saved with an auto-generated URI. Are you sure you want to continue?
saveWarning.messageLabel: This entity will be saved with an auto-generated label. Are you sure you want to continue?

export.title: Export Entities
export.description: Select the entity types you want to export as a Turtle RDF file.
export.largeWarning: You are about to export {{count}} entities. The result may be large and take some time to generate.

turtleExport.title: Export as Turtle
turtleExport.exportAllEntities: Export all entity types as Turtle
turtleExport.largeExportConfirmMessage: This will fetch and serialize all triples for {{count}} entities of type {{className}}. The result may be large. Continue?
turtleExport.allLargeExportConfirmMessage: This will fetch and serialize all triples for {{count}} entities across all types. The result may be large. Continue?
